message:
feat(dashboard): show 'scan off' indicator in status bar when UBS scanning disabled

When the user presses 'u' to disable UBS scanning, the status bar now
shows "scan off" as visual feedback. This mirrors how "paused" is shown
when auto-refresh is paused.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
